dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 7410 IH: To designate the facility of the United States Postal Service located at 15422 NY 104 in Martville, New York, as the “Sergeant Staret J. Engleston Memorial Post Office Building”.
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Ms. Tenney (for herself, Mr. Morelle, Ms. Meng, Ms. Malliotakis, Mr. Nadler, Mr. Lawler, Mr. Riley of New York, Mr. Mannion, Mr. Suozzi, and Mr. Garbarino) introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Oversight and Government Reform

form.official-title: To designate the facility of the United States Postal Service located at 15422 NY 104 in Martville, New York, as the Sergeant Staret J. Engleston Memorial Post Office Building.

section.header: Sergeant Staret J. Engleston Memorial Post Office Building

subsection.text: The facility of the United States Postal Service located at 15422 NY 104 in Martville, New York, as the Sergeant Staret J. Engleston Memorial Post Office Building.

Any reference in a law, map, regulation, document, paper, or other record of the United States to the facility referred to in subsection (a) shall be deemed to be a reference to the Sergeant Staret J. Engleston Memorial Post Office Building.
